title: Cross-platform backup, import, and export hardening

acceptance_criteria.text: Define a cross-platform backup compatibility matrix for Windows, Android, and iOS, including encrypted .apexbackup export/import and legacy JSON import.
Add automated tests or scripted fixtures proving backup decrypt/import compatibility across schema versions and representative learner data.
evidence: src/backup.test.ts covers representative multi-track state, encrypted round-trip, legacy JSON import, and legacy schema migration.

acceptance_criteria.text: Verify corrupted, wrong-passphrase, unsupported-version, and partial-file failures produce safe, understandable errors without data loss.
evidence: src/backup.ts rejects malformed JSON and unsupported encrypted envelopes safely.
src/backup.test.ts covers malformed JSON, wrong passphrase, unsupported version, and truncated encrypted payloads.

acceptance_criteria.text: Validate backup/export/import behavior on each supported platform or record exact platform blockers tied to 217/218.
evidence: docs/backup-restore.md records Windows support plus Android blocker on 217 and iOS blocker on 218.

acceptance_criteria.text: Document user-facing backup restore, cross-device transfer, and recovery instructions.
